fixes.description: Strip <think>...</think> blocks from model responses (Nemotron/reasoning models)
fixes.details: Added stripThinkingBlocks() helper before Types section. Applied to both complete() and stream() return values. Logic lives in model client, transport stays clean.

fixes.description: Add systemPrompt field to instance config schema + index.ts resolution
fixes.details: Schema: added systemPrompt string property. index.ts SYSTEM_PROMPT resolution order: env var > instance config > hardcoded default.

fixes.description: Add vectra init prompt for system prompt
fixes.details: Added step 7 prompt between providers and ATP path. InstanceConfig interface updated with systemPrompt?: string. Config object conditionally includes systemPrompt if user provided one.
